No Poverty.reason: The course syllabus contains no explicit or implicit evidence related to poverty eradication or economic resources for the poor.

Zero Hunger.reason: The course syllabus provides no evidence pertaining to food security, nutrition, or sustainable agriculture practices.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: There is no mention in the course description or objectives that relates to health, well-being, or disease prevention.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and teaches technical skills for employment and decent jobs (Target 4.4) through program analysis and testing.
evidence: foundational skills in program analysis and testing

Gender Equality.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any specific content or objectives related to promoting gender equality or empowering women and girls.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus connects to water management, sanitation, or reducing pollution.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course syllabus lacks any content related to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course provides foundational skills in a high-value IT sector, supporting technological upgrading and innovation (Target 8.2) and contributing to future decent job creation.
evidence: foundational skills in program analysis and testing
Building moderately complex programs using software frameworks

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course directly focuses on building 'software systems with greater reliability and security,' which constitutes resilient digital infrastructure (Target 9.1) and enhances technological capabilities and innovation (Target 9.5).
evidence: building software systems with greater reliability and security

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course syllabus does not address income growth, social inclusion, or discriminatory practices to reduce inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus relates to urban planning, housing, transport, or cultural heritage.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course syllabus does not contain content on sustainable consumption, waste reduction, or resource efficiency.

Climate Action.reason: There is no evidence in the course syllabus that addresses climate change mitigation, adaptation, or awareness.

Life Below Water.reason: The course syllabus provides no evidence related to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or sustainable fisheries.

Life on Land.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus connects to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or combating desertification.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course's focus on software 'security,' 'vulnerabilities,' and 'breaches' directly supports building effective, accountable institutions (Target 16.6) by securing digital systems against cyber threats.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course promotes knowledge sharing (Target 17.6) and enabling technology (Target 17.8) by teaching students to effectively utilize 'open-source analyzing/testing tools'.
